slots.caption_ig:
Bread-to-meat ratio kills 70% of sandwiches. Too much bread = dry. Too little = wet hands. The sweet spot for a cheesesteak is ~1:1.2 by weight. We score this on every meat-bread dish in the app.

#ForkFox #FoodAnatomy #FoodScience #Cheesesteak #DishNotRestaurant
slots.caption_fb: Most sandwiches are killed by the wrong ratio. Too much bread and you taste filler. Too little and your hands are a mess in 30 seconds. The sweet spot for a Philadelphia cheesesteak is roughly 1 part bread to 1.2 parts meat by weight. We score this on every meat-and-bread dish.
slots.image_gen_prompt: Cross-section macro photograph of a cheesesteak cut in half. Scale icon overlay showing 1:1.2 ratio. Editorial lighting. 1080x1080.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 7s. Two cheesesteaks side-by-side: left over-bunned, right balanced. Scale animates in showing the ratio difference. End: 'Bread to meat 1:1.2.'
